observations.summary: Aviel experiences a tension between the heavy burden of his current life and the desperate desire to escape it, as indicated by his manic voice and the vision urging him to leave and cast off his house and all associated burdens.

left_evidence.quote: that I need to leave. To cast off this burden. This house. All of it.

right_evidence.quote: Aviel's voice rose, gaining that manic edge Dan had learned to recognize—the sound of a desperate man who thinks he's found an escape route.

bridge_evidence.quote: The vision was telling me—telling *me*—that I need to leave.
